recommendations.title: My First Time
recommendations.overview: Zachary is 20 years old. Dark and independent, he collects amorous conquests and school failure. Sarah is 18 years old. First class, fragile, she fills her emotional gaps with perfect control of his life. Nothing should close and yet, the year of the

recommendations.title: Mädchen in Uniform
recommendations.overview: A sensitive girl is sent to an all-girls boarding school and develops a romantic attachment to one of her teachers.

recommendations.title: Jack Frost
recommendations.overview: A father, who can't keep his promises, dies in a car accident. One year later, he returns as a snowman, who has the final chance to put things right with his son before he is gone forever.

recommendations.title: The Florida Project
recommendations.overview: The story of a precocious six year-old and her ragtag group of friends whose summer break is filled with childhood wonder, possibility and a sense of adventure while the adults around them struggle with hard times.

recommendations.title: Exploits of a Young Don Juan
recommendations.overview: In 1914, sixteen year old Roger returned home from boarding school during vacation to find his puberty hit hard in a house filled with beautiful women. These women have previous engagements with other men who are away, and during this time, Roger imp

recommendations.title: The Student
recommendations.overview: A high school student becomes convinced that the world is lost to evil and begins to challenge the morals and beliefs of the adults surrounding him.

recommendations.title: I Am Greta
recommendations.overview: Greta Thunberg, a 15-year-old student in Sweden, started a school strike for the climate as her question for adults was, if you don’t care about my future on earth, why should I care about my future in school? Within months, her strike evolved into a

recommendations.title: Help! I'm a Fish
recommendations.overview: Three children are accidentally transformed into fish after consuming a potion made by an eccentric scientist. The kids end up in the sea, with one problem: they must find and drink the antidote within 48 hours, or forever remain as fish.

recommendations.title: Life in a Year
recommendations.overview: A 17 year old finds out that his girlfriend is dying, so he sets out to give her an entire life, in the last year she has left.

recommendations.title: Back to School
recommendations.overview: Two adults go to their middle school reunion in order to show off their success to old bullies teenage crushes.
